messages.content: Build a REST API for a blog platform

# Blog Platform REST API

## Endpoints

### Posts
- `GET /api/posts` - List all posts (paginated)
- `GET /api/posts/{id}` - Get single post
- `POST /api/posts` - Create post (admin only)
- `PUT /api/posts/{id}` - Update post
- `DELETE /api/posts/{id}` - Delete post

### Comments
- `GET /api/posts/{id}/comments` - List comments
- `POST /api/posts/{id}/comments` - Add comment

## Data Model

```json
{
  "post": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "title": "string",
    "content": "string",
    "author_id": "uuid",
    "created_at": "ISO8601",
    "updated_at": "ISO8601",
    "tags": ["string"],
    "published": "boolean"
  }
}
```

## Authentication

Use JWT tokens in Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Token expires in 24 hours. Refresh endpoint: `POST /auth/refresh`.

## Rate Limiting

- 100 requests/min for anonymous users
- 1000 requests/min for authenticated users
- Return 429 when exceeded
